faq.pharmacy: Our pharmacy is open 24/7 on the ground floor.
faq.ambulance: We have two ambulance units available for emergency pick-up. Call 102.
faq.insurance: We accept all major CGHS, TPA, and private health insurance plans.
faq.parking: Free parking is available in the basement for all patients.
faq.visiting: Visiting hours are from 4 PM to 6 PM daily.
